shared_facts: The United States has conducted multiple rounds of military strikes against targets in Iran over a 48-hour period.
Donald Trump, via social media, characterized the US military actions as retribution for attacks on ships.
Iranian state media has reported explosions occurring in various locations, including southern port cities.
synthesis: The United States has conducted multiple waves of airstrikes against military and logistical targets in Iran following disputes regarding maritime navigation in the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian state media has acknowledged explosions across various southern cities and released footage of damage to a high-profile compound. President Donald Trump has publicly attributed the US military actions to retaliatory measures for recent attacks on commercial vessels.
confidence: MEDIUM. While multiple sources confirm the escalation of conflict and the exchange of fire, there is numerical disagreement regarding the scale of the US strikes and unverified reports of attacks on US bases.
